revision.comment: cat update
revision.text:
This category covers aristocrats, court officials, and bureaucrats of Japan prior to the [[Asuka period]] (538-710).
[[Category:People of ancient Japan]] [[Category:Japanese nobility]]

revision.text:
==Old Content== This category covers aristocrats, court officials, and bureaucrats of Japan prior to the [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka period]] (538-710).
==Categories==
[[en:Aristocracy of ancient Japan]] [[en:Category:Aristocracy of ancient Japan]] {{wikidata link|Q8262991}} [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Japanese nobility]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:People of ancient Japan]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 2 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template (has duplicate-language pairs) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25460205297|commit triggered pipeline]]
